title: Add option to select Hyper-V as machine provider when installing or upgrading
body:
### Feature request description

When upgrading or doing a clean installment, there is an option to install WSL if it's not installed. Since podman has already support Hyper-V, please add another option to automatically set the config file to use Hyper-V as machine provider
ref: https://github.com/containers/podman-desktop/issues/8454

### Suggest potential solution

User can select which machine provider to use when installing.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

Please see the ref.

### Additional context

NA
